COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-01-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Michael Mooney, Esq. for Plaintiff: Laner electric Supply Co., Inc.
No appearances by the Defendant: PaulDouglas Bouchard Ind and dba Bouchard Electric Company.
09:50 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: James Laner, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Statements of account and invoices-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Credit application --------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Ltr. from Commercial Recovery with Two NSF checks attached---ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Damages $9,486.79.
Interest and Attorney's Fees to be calculated by counsel.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit and to prepare Judgment.

Nov. 5, 2004
Judgment rec'd in court, granted as follows:
Damages $9,486.79
Prejudgment Interest $608.65
Attorney's Fees $1,275.00
Costs $198.30
Civil Code 1719 $3,000.00 for a total of $14,568.74
Judgment signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2004 Set For Trial On Oct-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
